topic: Bile acids: essential for fat digestion and detox
caption: Did you know bile acids play a crucial role in fat digestion and detox? 🌟 They help break down fats into smaller particles, making them easier to absorb. 💡 But that's not all - bile acids also aid in removing toxins from the body. 🌿 Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. 🙏 #bileacids #fatsdigestion #detox #healthyliving #guthealth #liverfunction #digestivehealth #medicalfacts
